HELLO, I’M

Sasion Nanthaphiriyakit

Strategic Advisor for Platform, Growth, and Capital Decisions

I work with founders, executives, and investors on high-impact decisions that directly affect revenue, valuation, and market position.

My focus is turning strategy into measurable outcomes — not presentations.

What Makes Me Different

Unlike traditional consultants, I operate within the business, not outside it.

  • Built and scaled platforms from 0 → revenue
  • Owned real P&L and monetization systems
  • Focused on execution tied to measurable outcomes

Selected Outcomes

  • THB 66M revenue generated within 3 months
  • $8M raised within 24 hours (Web3 / GameFi)
  • 299K peak concurrent users (PCU)
  • Strong monetization metrics across ARPPU, retention, and pay rate

Typically engaged for high-impact problems across platform growth, monetization, and strategic execution.

Chief Executive Officer
Gamify Co., Ltd.
Led overall business strategy, budget planning, platform operations, and compliance architecture for a digital platform business.
